RM220/#1 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES AND THE COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARRA, ISRAEL SANTANA, MARIA DEL CARMEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 44 PATTON STREET, S.F. $3,650.00 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $158.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,108.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION OF WRIT STAYED TILL 3/1/98 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS.
